reasoning: On April 13, 2025, Elon Musk announced that Starlink is now available in Somalia, and the Somalian government simultaneously confirmed they granted an operational license to SpaceX. Subsequent reports indicate that Starlink internet services have launched in the country, with one article from early May noting that Starlink had expanded coverage to Somalia 'according to publicly available service maps'. Starlink historically updates its availability map immediately upon announcing availability in a new country. There is no evidence suggesting it won't be on the map before July 1, 2025, and overwhelming evidence that it was already placed on the map as of mid-April.
